positive: A stylized, maximalist bohemian forest scene, featuring silhouetted woodland creatures (fox, deer, owl) interspersed with exaggerated, stylized floral elements like oversized ferns and glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. The composition should be centered and circular, suitable for a repeating print pattern. Use a deep indigo and burnt orange color palette with accents of creamy off-white highlights. Highly detailed line art overlaying deep, dramatic color washes. Style: Art Nouveau meets modern graphic design. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting creating deep contrast and clean silhouettes. Composition: Perfect central symmetry. Minimalist bleed area.
